creator: itojun@itojun.org
text:
just to report the current situation.
- i found the plain2 release (versioned x).
- i found unofficial patch for plain2 (supports html), version x-1.
- it is known that plain2 newer than version x is available somewhere
  (maybe inside NEC only? i'm not sure) and it includes the above
  unofficial patch.

so i asked the current maintanier of plain2 to release the current
snapshot, more recent than version x, to somewhere on the net.
i'm waiting for the reply but there's no reply...

itojun
